name: almondoo-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace published by almondoo.

plugins.name: sample
plugins.description: Minimal sample plugin with a single `hello` skill. Use as a starter template when adding new plugins to this marketplace.

plugins.name: claude-md-parallel-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent parallel audit of CLAUDE.md and similar agent-instruction files. Dispatches N independent subagents, aggregates findings by reproducibility (≥4/9 default), and proposes targeted fixes.
